next_action.message:
Hi Elena,  

Thanks for sharing the updated date of the accident — we’ve noted your confirmation. To move your claim forward, we’ll need the finance agreement. If you’re unable to provide it right away, let us know, and we’ll follow up when you’re ready.  

I’ve noted your question about contacting your lender directly, and a team member will reach out to address that.  

Thanks for your patience, and feel free to reply with any updates!  

Best,
